calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2018 Continued To Feb-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant S Deposition
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gretchen Birkheimer, Esq. 650-843-1900 of Pierce & Shearer LLP for Plaintiff Madhavi Dalmia through Court Call.
Ashley Baltazar, Esq. 650-843-1900 of Hanson Bridgett for Defendant MATTERPORT, INC.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with modification as follows:

DEFENDANT MATTERPORT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant's Deposition.

Defendant's/Cross-complaint's Motion to Compel Deposition is granted. Plaintiff/Cross-defendant is to set/provide a date certain for her deposition to take place within 30-days. Sanctions in the amount of $3,000 are awarded to the moving party. Sanctions to be paid within 14 days.

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 electronically to the Judge Pro Tem at jskrmpotic@lowball.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
